🏠 Property: 1st floor flat, residential block

📊 Lock: UPVC door, euro cylinder (likely Yale)

PlumbersElectriciansBuildersRoofersLocksmithsLandscapersHeating EngineersPest ControlCleanersDrainageJoinersPlasterersTilersCarpentersHandymen
The Problem

Why Locksmiths Lose Jobs to Missed Calls

Lockouts are the most time-sensitive trade enquiries. A customer locked out in the rain will call every locksmith on Google until someone answers. If you're on another job or asleep, that £150 callout goes to your competitor.

Lockouts are urgent — customers call 3-4 locksmiths at once

A customer locked out at 11pm is panicking. They Google 'emergency locksmith near me' and call every number on page one. The first to answer gets the £120 callout. If you're on another job or asleep, you miss it. Katie answers instantly, captures the details, and reassures the customer you're on your way.

Key replacement calls seem small but build repeat business

A tenant calls to replace their key. Seems like a £15 job. But Katie captures that it's a rental property with 5 tenants. The landlord might need all locks rekeyed (£200+). Or the customer might need a security survey. Katie doesn't miss the upsell opportunity in a simple key-cutting call.

Late-night commercial lockouts are premium jobs

A pub landlord calls at 1am — front door lock failed, can't secure the premises. This is a £200+ emergency callout plus a new lock. If you're asleep, the call goes to voicemail. The landlord calls the next number. Katie captures these high-value late-night commercial jobs while you sleep.

Security upgrade enquiries need detailed qualification

A customer calls for a 'security survey'. Voicemail says nothing. Katie captures: property type, number of doors/windows, current locks, whether they want CCTV/alarms/smart locks, budget range, and timeline. You arrive at the survey knowing exactly what to quote — £800 vs £3,500.

Watch Whoza capture a missed enquiry in 60 seconds

How It Works

How Katie Works for Locksmiths

Four simple steps from missed call to booked job. Katie handles the conversation. You handle the locks. Read our complete guide to AI call answering for more details.

1

Lockout call comes in — any time

Katie answers with your locksmith company's greeting. She identifies if it's an emergency lockout, key replacement, lock repair, or security upgrade enquiry.

2

Locksmith-specific qualification

Captures: property type, lock type (if known), how they got locked out, postcode, urgency level, and whether it's residential or commercial. Emergency lockouts get instant priority flagging.

3

WhatsApp with full context

Alert shows: 'Lockout — Yale euro cylinder — snapped key — 2nd floor flat — BS3 1AB — emergency — tenant locked out — landlord contact available' with customer number and ETA request.

4

Accept emergency or schedule upgrade

For lockouts: tap to accept and head straight there with the right tools. For security surveys: schedule at a convenient time. Commercial jobs get flagged for priority response.

How Whoza Works

From missed call to captured enquiry — automatically.

01

We Set Up Whoza on Your Number

Forward your number to Whoza. Live and answering calls in 30 minutes. No tech skills, no engineers, no downtime.

30 min
02

We Answer Your Calls

Katie or Mark answers every call, qualifies the enquiry, and sends it to your phone.

24/7
03

You Accept Jobs and Get Paid

Real enquiries land on your phone. Tap to accept, call back or decline. Enquiry captured.

Instant
04

Only Continue If It's Working

See real results first. No upfront cost. Cancel anytime if it's not right for you.

No commitment

No website? No problem.

We build your AI call profile from your services, FAQs, prices, service areas and preferred job types during onboarding.

We only make money, when you make money

Your AI Revenue Team

Meet Katie, Mark, Claire & Rex

Four AI specialists working together to answer calls, capture enquiries, collect reviews and show you what to improve next.

Call Capture

Katie

Female VoiceCustomisable

Katie answers calls 24/7, qualifies real customer enquiries, and sends them to WhatsApp while you work. Friendly, professional and calm under pressure - she helps customers feel heard before the enquiry reaches you.

Sample greeting:

"Hi, you've reached Thompson Plumbing. My name is Katie. How can I help you today?"

Ready to accept, call back or decline.

Call Capture

Mark

Male VoiceCustomisable

Mark answers calls 24/7, qualifies real customer enquiries, and sends them to WhatsApp while you work. Clear, efficient and professional - ideal if you prefer a direct male voice.

Sample greeting:

"Hi, you've reached Wilson Electrics. This is Mark speaking. What can I do for you?"

Job type, urgency, location and customer details captured.

Review Collection

Claire

Claire turns completed jobs into reviews

Claire follows up after completed work to request reviews while the customer still remembers the good service. Polite, timely and consistent - she helps turn good jobs into future trust.

Hi John, thanks for choosing Thompson Plumbing yesterday. If you were happy with the service, would you mind leaving us a quick review? It really helps. [Google review link]

More reviews. More trust. More customers choosing you.

Included in Growth plan and above.

Competitor Insights

Rex

Rex shows what to fix next

Rex checks your competitors, reviews and AI visibility, then turns the data into simple actions you can use each week.

Your nearest competitor has 41 reviews. You have 32. Action this week: request 5 more reviews from recent customers and reply to your last 3 Google reviews.

Clear weekly actions to improve visibility and help AI search recommend your business.

Monthly competitor analysis on every plan. Weekly actions from Growth upwards.

Choose the voice and name that fits your business. Switch anytime.

What happens after you sign up?

Live in less than 30 minutes. Here's how.

Step 1

Choose your AI assistant

Pick Katie, Mark, or choose any male or female assistant name you prefer.

Step 2

Select your voice and add your business details

Choose a male or female voice from the dropdown, then add your services, service area, hours, FAQs and preferred job types.

Step 3

We build your AI call profile and business knowledge base

Whoza creates the information your assistant uses to answer calls, qualify enquiries and route details correctly.

Step 4

You approve a test call

Listen to how your assistant handles a real-style customer enquiry and request edits if needed.

Step 5

Your Whoza agent goes live on your number

Once approved, your AI assistant starts answering calls and sending qualified enquiries straight to your phone.

Simple pricing that scales with your business. Most customers cover their cost in their first few jobs. Only continue if it's working for you.

Each plan includes enquiries, with additional ones charged per job - so you can scale as you grow.

Start small. Only pay more as you get more work.

Additional call handling minutes are charged at £0.26 per minute across all plans. You can monitor and control usage at any time.

Got Questions?

Locksmith FAQ

Everything you need to know about AI call handling for locksmith businesses

How much does AI call handling cost for locksmiths?

Whoza.ai starts at £59/month for the Starter plan. One captured emergency lockout averages £80-£150 callout fee. A full security upgrade can be £500-£2,000. At £59/month, one emergency lockout callout pays for the entire year. Overage minutes are billed at £0.26/minute. No hidden fees or contracts.

Plans start at £59/month. See full pricing and plan details.

Can Katie handle emergency lockout calls at 3am?

Yes. Katie answers 24/7, 365 days a year. She identifies lockout emergencies by keywords like 'locked out', 'lost keys', 'broken key', 'snapped key', 'can't get in', 'urgent', and 'emergency' — and marks the enquiry as emergency priority. You get an immediate WhatsApp with 'LOCKOUT EMERGENCY — URGENT' in the header, even at 3am on Christmas Day.

What information does Katie collect from lockout customers?

Katie collects: full name, phone number, postcode, property type (house/flat/commercial), lock type (if known — Yale, Chubb, euro cylinder, mortice, digital), how they got locked out (lost keys, broken key, snapped in lock, locked inside, lock failure), whether it's a tenant or landlord situation, number of locks affected, and how they found you.

Can Katie distinguish between a residential lockout and a commercial security job?

Yes. Katie is trained to identify the type of locksmith job from the customer's description. 'Locked out of my house' gets residential lockout priority. 'Need to change all locks on my rental property' gets landlord/multi-property tagging. 'Security survey for my shop' gets commercial security priority. Each type gets different follow-up handling in your dashboard.

Does Katie handle UPVC door lock and window lock enquiries?

Yes. Katie recognises UPVC-specific terminology like 'euro cylinder', 'multipoint lock', 'mechanism failure', 'window lock', 'patio door', and 'French door'. She captures the specific issue and marks it as 'UPVC specialist' in your dashboard so you know to bring the right replacement parts.

How does whoza.ai help with key cutting and key replacement enquiries?

Katie captures key replacement enquiries with: type of key (house key, car key, safe key, padlock key), whether it's a standard key or high-security key, number of copies needed, and whether the customer can bring the lock or key to you. She can also ask if they need the lock rekeyed or just a key cut.

Can Katie handle calls about security upgrades and CCTV?

Yes. Katie identifies security upgrade calls by keywords like 'security survey', 'CCTV', 'alarm', 'smart lock', 'digital lock', 'keyless entry', and 'high security'. She captures: property type, number of entry points, current security level, budget range, and preferred survey date. These high-value enquiries (£500-£3,000+) get flagged as 'security upgrade' for priority follow-up.

Will customers trust an AI with their lockout emergency?

Katie introduces herself as your AI assistant and explains that she's capturing details so you can respond immediately. Most lockout customers are relieved to speak to someone right away rather than leaving a voicemail. Katie reassures them that their locksmith has been notified and will call back within minutes. In our surveys, 89% of callers are satisfied with the AI experience.
Locksmith Testimonial
"I was fitting a new mortice lock in Shoreditch when my phone rang twice. First was a key replacement — £20 job. Second was a full security upgrade for a restaurant in Hackney — £1,800 including smart locks, CCTV, and alarm integration. Katie captured both with full details. I called back at 4pm, quoted the upgrade on the spot, and booked it for next week."
AP

Ade Patterson

Patterson Security Solutions, East London

One Security Upgrade Pays for 2 Years of Katie

Emergency lockouts average £80-£150. Key replacements £15-£40. Security upgrades £500-£3,000+. Smart lock installations £800-£2,500. At £59/month, capturing one missed security survey pays for years of service.
